about.title: Nice to meet you, I'm Meir
about.body: A web developer with a real passion for design and the small details. I personally guide every client — from the first idea until the site is live — explaining everything in plain language, with no jargon and no surprises.
about.story1: I started building websites out of curiosity — and stayed for that moment when a client sees their site for the first time. For me, every project is a chance to build something that truly works: fast, beautiful, and driving real results.
about.story2: I believe building a website shouldn't be complicated or stressful. That's why I focus on precise expectations, clear timelines and real availability — you always know where the project stands and what comes next.

faq.title: Everything you wanted to know
faq.subtitle: Didn't find an answer? Send me a message and I'll be happy to help

items.q: How long does it take to build a website?
items.a: It depends on the package: a basic site is delivered within 7 working days, a business site within 14, and a premium project by scope — we always agree on an exact timeline in advance.

items.q: What do I need to prepare before we start?
items.a: Mostly — just the desire. If you have a logo, texts and photos, great; if not, I'll help you source and write everything.

items.q: Will my website appear on Google?
items.a: Yes. Every site is built on proper SEO foundations; Business and Premium packages get extended optimization.

items.q: What do the free revisions include?
items.a: After delivery you get revision rounds according to your package — from text and image changes to design adjustments. Everything is detailed upfront in the quote.

items.q: Can I upgrade my package midway?
items.a: Absolutely! You can start with Basic and expand later — the site is built so it's easy to add pages and capabilities.

items.q: Who handles the domain and hosting?
items.a: I guide you through purchasing a domain (in your name!) and deploy the site to fast, reliable hosting. Everything is transparent — you own it all.
We agree on everything upfront: a deposit at the start and the balance on delivery. No surprises, no hidden costs.
